+def predict(model, skill_ids, corrects, lengths, device, batch_size=128):

+    from torch.utils.data import TensorDataset, DataLoader

+    dataset = TensorDataset(skill_ids, corrects, lengths)

+    loader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=batch_size, shuffle=False)

+    

+    all_probs = []

     with torch.no_grad():

-        logits = model(skill_ids.to(device), corrects.to(device), lengths.to(device))

-        pred_logits = logits[:, 1:]

-        probs = torch.sigmoid(pred_logits)

-        return probs.cpu()

+        for s, c, l in loader:

+            s, c, l = s.to(device), c.to(device), l.to(device)

+            logits = model(s, c, l)

+            pred_logits = logits[:, 1:]

+            T = c.shape[1]

+            mask = torch.arange(T - 1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < (l.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

+            probs = torch.sigmoid(pred_logits)

+            all_probs.append(probs[mask].cpu().numpy())

+    import numpy as np

+    return np.concatenate(all_probs)
